briefdescription.para: creates bitset of given size filled with given value Generated from constructor MR.ObjBitSet.ObjBitSet. Parameter fillValue defaults to false.
copies all bits from another BitSet (or a descending class, e.g. TypedBitSet) Generated from constructor MR.ObjBitSet.ObjBitSet.
moves all bits from another BitSet (or a descending class, e.g. TypedBitSet) Generated from constructor MR.ObjBitSet.ObjBitSet.
Generated from method MR::ObjBitSet::test_set. Parameter val defaults to true.
subtracts b from this, considering that bits in b are shifted right on bShiftInBlocks*bits_per_block Generated from method MR.ObjBitSet.subtract.
Generated from method MR.ObjBitSet.autoResizeSet. Parameter val defaults to true.
Generated from method MR.ObjBitSet.autoResizeSet. Parameter val defaults to true.
Generated from method MR.ObjBitSet.autoResizeTestSet. Parameter val defaults to true.
Generated from method MR.ObjBitSet.resize. Parameter fillValue defaults to false.
Generated from method MR.ObjBitSet.uncheckedTestSet. Parameter val defaults to true.
changes the order of bits on the opposite Generated from method MR.ObjBitSet.reverse.
adds one more bit with the given value in the container, increasing its size on 1 Generated from method MR::ObjBitSet::push_back.
removes last bit from the container, decreasing its size on 1 Generated from method MR::ObjBitSet::pop_back.
doubles reserved memory until resize(newSize) can be done without reallocation Generated from method MR.ObjBitSet.resizeWithReserve.

Vector<bool, I> like container (random-access, I - index type, bool - value type) with all bits after size() considered off during testing Generated from class MR.ObjBitSet. Base classes: Direct: (non-virtual) MR.BitSet This is the non-const half of the class.
